hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path',''); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'You edited CLAUDE.md \u2014 MIRROR RULE: make the equivalent change in .github/copilot-instructions.md (it drives GitHub Copilot review of every PR). Treat the change as incomplete until both files reflect it.'}})) if fp.endswith('CLAUDE.md') else None"
